column8: Amy was clothes shopping. She was trying on new outfits when her mobile phone suddenly______ . (RING)
column9: It was her friend Adam. He wanted to know if she needed any help_____________for their history test. (STUDY)
column10: "Yes,please!" said Amy. "I__________badly in the last test, so I really want to impress Mrs Sanders this time". (DO)
column11: They arranged to meet at Adam's house at seven o'clock. "I can't find my history notes, so remember to bring_________," said Adam. (YOU)
column12: At eight o'clock, Amy still___________. Adam was not happy. (NOT ARRIVE)
column13: "I can't wait any__________," he thought to himself. "I'll have to get the notes from someone else." (LONG)
column14: He was just about to call his friend Tom when he heard a couple of___________voices outside. It was Amy and an older woman. (WOMAN)
column15: Adam opened the door. "He Adam", said Amy. "Sorry I'm a few minutes late. The bad news is that I________my history notes too." (LOSE)
column16: Amy smiled. "But don't worry because this is a good friend of_________ - and she's a history teacher!" (ME)
column17: The rouble is the currency of Russia. It__________in use for around five centuries. (BE)
column18: Sometimes, the rouble used in Russia___________as the Russian rouble. This is because some other countries also call their currencies roubles. (KNOW)
column19: In the 1700s, Russian rubles____________with precious metals such as silver, gold and platinum. (MAKE)
column20: The Russian government____________printing paper money until towards the end of the 1700s. (BEGIN)
column21: Russian rouble banknotes today have images of well-known places in Russia, as well as famous_______in Russia history. (MAN)
column22: The banknotes have modern features that stop____________from being copied illegally. (THEY)
column23: The_____________amount that appears on a banknote is 5000 Russian rubles. After that, there are banknotes worth 1000, 100, 50, 10 and five roubles. (HIGH)
column24: However, there are also 5 and 10 rouble coins, and these are used___________than the 5 and 10 rouble banknotes. (COMMONLY)
column25: Because 5 rouble coins are used so often, the government decided to stop__________the 5-rouble banknotes anymore. (PRINT)
